result: If I could change the world in one way, I would eliminate all forms of systemic inequality—ensuring that every person, regardless of their birthplace, identity, or background, has equal access to education, healthcare, economic opportunity, and justice. This would mean dismantling barriers rooted in race, gender, class, and geography, and empowering individuals to shape their own futures. The ripple effects would be profound: reduced conflict, greater innovation, and a global community where everyone can contribute their unique talents without being held back by circumstances beyond their control.

prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
